title: Tipped Tools
body:
### Tipped Tools **A Unique Twist To Minecraft**
>**Tip Iron Tools With Emeralds, Diamonds, Netherite Scraps, Or Gold**
>**Tools Can Gain Durability, Attack, Break Speed, Or Damage, But Only One**
>**Tip The Tools Inside Of The Smithing Table**
`> Supported Mods` > **[DiamondIngots](https://modrinth.com/mod/diamond-ingots)** ###### You Will ONLY FInd My Mods On [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/tipped-tools) & [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/tipped-tools)
